title: cordia lima
intro: Cordia lima, also known as the wild lima or lima tree, is a small tree native to tropical regions of Central and South America, with a rich history of traditional use in folk medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, allowing it to be used to treat a variety of health issues. Its leaves, bark, and roots have been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Cordia lima can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
